description: Magical or otherworldly atmospheric conditions for fantasy settings.
weather: under a sky full of shooting stars
Streaks of light blazing across the heavens in a celestial display.
during an aurora that touches the ground
Curtains of colored light rippling down to brush the earth.
as glowing embers drift through the air
Tiny points of orange light floating like fireflies.
A darkness deeper than night that swallows even torchlight.
during a rain of flower petals
Soft petals falling from nowhere, carpeting the ground.
Two moons casting overlapping silver light on the world.
as the sky turns an impossible color
The sky shifting to a color that has no name.
as the trees whisper in unison
Every tree murmuring the same words at once.
during a rain of golden light
Drops of liquid light falling from the sky.
under a sky that hums with magic
A low vibration in the air that makes magic stronger.
as frost creeps across everything it touches
Magical ice spreading in crystalline patterns across every surface.
Thousands of tiny lights drifting and swirling in the dark.
The sun blotted out, plunging the world into eerie twilight.
in a warm wind that carries voices
A gentle breeze that seems to speak in half-heard words.
